zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Kennedy 3rd of Bargany於1461年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾時，他的父親Gilbert Kennedy 1st Lord Kennedy56歲，母親Lady Catherine Maxwell51歲。他於1485年9月15日與Katherine Kennedy在蘇格蘭艾斯爾巴甘尼結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1528年4月8日在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安利思享年67歲。

nameMeanings.name: Kennedy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Ceannéidigh ‘descendant of Ceannéidigh’ (from ceann ‘head’ + éidigh ‘ugly’); or from the Scottish Gaelic Mac Cinnèidigh, consisting of mac ‘son’ with an equivalent name. Compare Canaday , Cannady , Cannedy , Kannady , and Kenedy .

History: Kennedy ancestral lands are found both in Ireland and in Scotland, where the family's medieval ancestral seat is sited on the Ayrshire coast, facing the Irish Sea. — The great-grandparents of President John Fitzgerald Kennedy (1917–63) came to North America as immigrants from Ireland in the 1840s. His paternal great-grandparents were Patrick Kennedy (1823–58), born in Dunganstown, County Wexford, Ireland, and Bridget Murphy, who was born probably in Owenduff, County Wexford, Ireland c. 1827; they came to Boston, MA, in 1849. His maternal great-grandparents were Thomas Fitzgerald (1823–85), who was born in Bruff, County Limerick, Ireland, and Rose Anna Cox, who was born probably in Tomregan or Kinawley, County Cavan, Ireland, c. 1835; they came to Boston, MA, in 1857. — An early Scottish Kennedy forebear of a quite different family was British colonial official Archibald Kennedy (1685–1763), the son of Alexander Kennedy of Craigoch, who emigrated to NY c. 1710.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Kennedy 3rd of Bargany was born in 1461, in Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, Gilbert Kennedy 1st Lord Kennedy, was 56 and his mother, Lady Catherine Maxwell, was 51. He married Katherine Kennedy on 15 September 1485, in Bargany, Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 8 April 1528, in Leith, Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 67.

Il a épousé Katherine Kennedy le 15 septembre 1485, à Bargany, Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 8 avril 1528, à Leith, Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Kennedy 3rd of Barganyが1461年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Gilbert Kennedy 1st Lord Kennedyは56歳，母Lady Catherine Maxwellは51歳であった。1485年9月15日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアバーガニーでKatherine Kennedyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1528年4月8日にイギリススコットランドミドロスアンレイスで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Kennedy 3rd of Bargany(이)가 1461년 스컷랜드 에이르실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert Kennedy 1st Lord Kennedy(은)는 56세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Catherine Maxwell(은)는 51세였다. 그는 1485년 9월 15일 스컷랜드 에이르실르 바건이에서 Katherine Kennedy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1528년 4월 8일 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언 레이스에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Kennedy 3rd of Bargany родился в 1461 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Gilbert Kennedy 1st Lord Kennedy было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Catherine Maxwell, 51. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Kennedy 15 сентября 1485 г. в местности баргани, аиршир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 8 апреля 1528 г. в местности лит, мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет.
